title: YouTube Launches Gemini-Powered Creator Partnerships With AI Matching
text:
SUBSCRIPTION ONLY
NewFronts
YouTube Launches Gemini-Powered Creator Partnerships With AI Matching
YouTube is positioning itself as a comprehensive operating system for creator marketing—a shift that could unseat third-party creator platforms
YouTube is transforming its creator marketing stack.
Pixdeluxe via Getty Images
By
Kendra Barnett
The future of brands gets decided here. Join the industry’s top marketers at Brandweek for the ideas, insights, and connections shaping what’s next.
Get your ticket.
YouTube isn’t satisfied with serving one or two slices of brands’ creator marketing demands. It wants the whole pie.
On Monday, ahead of YouTube’s NewFronts presentation this week, the Google-owned video site announced that it is repackaging BrandConnect, its tool for connecting YouTube creators with brands for sponsorship deals, into what will now be known as Creator Partnerships—and giving it an AI makeover. The platform will be backed by Gemini, Google’s suite of frontier AI models, to intelligently pair advertisers with creators that suit their needs.
“It’s historically been challenging for advertisers to find the right creator to work with and then scale their efforts globally,” said Melissa Nikolic, director of product management for YouTube Creator Ads, on a call with press.
Kendra Barnett
Kendra Barnett is Adweek's senior tech reporter.
